module.name: scoriginquality
module.description:
Automatic A/B/C/D origin quality grader.
Subscribes to LOCATION messages and assigns a quality grade to each incoming origin using a worst-of rule. The grade is written back as an origin Comment visible in scolv and scesv without any additional configuration. Hovering over the grade shows a per-parameter breakdown.
Two categories of input are used:
Network geometry (statistical proxies for constraint quality): azimuthal gap, secondary azimuthal gap, station count, min. distance
Locator output (direct measures of location quality): RMS residual, horizontal uncertainty (semi-major axis, km), depth uncertainty (km), iLoc ground truth level (GT0-GT25)
Parameters not present in the data are silently skipped.
Default thresholds:
Grade | Gap | SecGap | RMS | Sta | MinDist | HorizUnc | DepUnc | GT ------+------+--------+--------+-----+---------+----------+--------+----- A | 90° | 135° | 0.15s | ≥10 | 30° | 5 km | 5 km | ≤GT2 B | 135° | 180° | 0.30s | ≥6 | 60° | 10 km | 15 km | ≤GT5 C | 180° | 210° | 0.50s | ≥4 | 90° | 20 km | 30 km | ≤GT10 D | anything worse than C

parameter.name: quality.commentID
parameter.description: ID of the Comment object written to each origin. This should match the ID configured in scolv (olv.originComments.quality.id) so the grade appears in the quality dropdown.

parameter.name: maxGap
parameter.description: Maximum primary azimuthal gap for grade A.

parameter.name: maxSecondaryGap
parameter.description: Maximum secondary azimuthal gap for grade A.

parameter.name: maxRMS
parameter.description: Maximum travel-time RMS residual for grade A.

parameter.name: minStations
parameter.description: Minimum number of used stations for grade A.

parameter.name: maxMinDist
parameter.description: Maximum nearest-station distance for grade A.

parameter.name: maxGap
parameter.description: Maximum primary azimuthal gap for grade B.

parameter.name: maxSecondaryGap
parameter.description: Maximum secondary azimuthal gap for grade B.

parameter.name: maxRMS
parameter.description: Maximum travel-time RMS residual for grade B.

parameter.name: minStations
parameter.description: Minimum number of used stations for grade B.

parameter.name: maxMinDist
parameter.description: Maximum nearest-station distance for grade B.

parameter.name: maxGap
parameter.description: Maximum primary azimuthal gap for grade C.

parameter.name: maxSecondaryGap
parameter.description: Maximum secondary azimuthal gap for grade C.

parameter.name: maxRMS
parameter.description: Maximum travel-time RMS residual for grade C.

parameter.name: minStations
parameter.description: Minimum number of used stations for grade C.

parameter.name: maxMinDist
parameter.description: Maximum nearest-station distance for grade C.

parameter.name: maxHorizUncertainty
parameter.description: Maximum horizontal uncertainty (semi-major axis) for grade C. Populated by LOCSAT, iLoc and other locators via OriginUncertainty.

parameter.name: maxDepthUncertainty
parameter.description: Maximum depth uncertainty for grade C. Populated by iLoc and other locators via OriginUncertainty.

parameter.name: maxHorizUncertainty
parameter.description: Maximum horizontal uncertainty (semi-major axis) for grade A.

parameter.name: maxDepthUncertainty
parameter.description: Maximum depth uncertainty for grade A.

parameter.name: maxHorizUncertainty
parameter.description: Maximum horizontal uncertainty (semi-major axis) for grade B.

parameter.name: maxDepthUncertainty
parameter.description: Maximum depth uncertainty for grade B.
